T(x) = x fixed point
Composition Algebra
bolt-cpp-ml² = bolt-cpp-ml(bolt-cpp-ml) = skill-creator( F(bolt-new ⊕ koboldcpp ⊕ janext ⊕ cpp-e2e-test-gen) ⊗ tutorialkit(neuro-nn) ) → skill∞
🌐
bolt-new
AI Web App Development
Build AI-powered full-stack web apps with WebContainers + LLM. Wraps KoboldCpp APIs in chat UIs, deploys interactive C++ ML demos.
🧠
koboldcpp
Local LLM Inference
Run GGUF models locally. OpenAI-compatible API, multimodal support. Direct integration with bolt-cppml GGML/RWKV engine.
🔌
janext
Jan Extension Development
Package bolt-cpp-ml as a Jan extension. Custom inference backends, UI panels, event hooks. TypeScript + @janhq/core.
🧪
cpp-e2e-test-gen
C++ E2E Test Generation
49/49 self-tests passing. Generate comprehensive E2E tests for any C++ repo. 7-phase workflow: catalog → write → compile → stabilize.
